message:
Add /how_it_was_made page for transcript viewer

- Hero section with session stats (duration, messages, tools, files)
- StatsDashboard integration with animated stat cards
- Introduction prose explaining transparency/education/meta-demonstration
- Key Insights section with InsightCards from annotations
- Timeline section with collapsible sections and message previews
- Footer CTA linking back to prompts
- Placeholder transcript data (ready for real data)

Closes jeffreysprompts.com-3r0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

First 3 prompts: idea-wizard, readme-reviser, robot-mode-maker.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:27:02.568149817-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T01:16:56.065027185-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T01:16:56.065027185-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented monorepo structure, core package with types, registry, search engine (BM25, tokenizer, synonyms), and export functions.  {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-pn6","title":"Implement error boundaries with fallback UI","description":"Part 7.10 of PLAN. Wrap SpotlightSearch and PromptGrid in error boundaries. Fallback UI shows friendly error message: 'Something went wrong loading prompts. Try refreshing.' Optional retry button. Prevents full page crashes from component errors. Styled to match design system.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:45:59.552933935-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T00:45:59.552933935-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-pn6","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-vsk","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:49:13.196597383-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

Uses platform-specific clipboard (pbcopy/xclip/wl-copy/clip). Applies template rendering before copy.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:26:49.388003961-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T01:42:01.213662236-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T01:42:01.213662236-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented copy command with platform-specific clipboard (pbcopy/xclip/wl-copy/clip), variable substitution, graceful fallback to stdout","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-puv","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-54i","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:29.913025463-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-puv","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-fiy","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:29.939571601-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-pvs","title":"Implement web app unit tests (apps/web/__tests__)","description":"**Details:**
- Test React components render correctly
- Test hooks (useLocalStorage, useBasket)
- Test search integration
- Test copy-to-clipboard functionality
- Test keyboard navigation in SpotlightSearch

**Component Tests:**
- PromptCard: renders all fields, handles expansion, copy works
- PromptGrid: responsive layout, basket integration
- SpotlightSearch: keyboard nav, search debounce, selection
- BasketSidebar: add/remove, export buttons, persistence
- CategoryFilter/TagFilter: selection state, URL sync

**Hook Tests:**
- useLocalStorage: persistence, hydration
- useBasket: add/remove/clear, context propagation

**Framework:** Vitest + @testing-library/react + happy-dom

**Test Organization:**
```
apps/web/__tests__/
  components/
    prompt-card.test.tsx
    spotlight-search.test.tsx
    basket-sidebar.test.tsx
  hooks/
    use-local-storage.test.ts
    use-basket.test.ts
  lib/
    search-engine.test.ts
```

**Reasoning:** Component tests catch UI regressions. Hook tests ensure state management works. Critical for maintaining UX quality across changes.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:32:31.273796804-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T00:32:31.273796804-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-pvs","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-r9m","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:38:08.603663868-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-qpp","title":"Implement stale-while-revalidate registry cache -- Details: loadRegistry() returns cached or embedded prompts. Background fetch with 2s timeout. Cache at $HOME/.config/jfp/registry.json. Meta at registry.meta.json (ETag, version, timestamps). Merge with local prompts from $HOME/.config/jfp/local/.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:27:21.304196074-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T01:21:03.76811154-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T01:21:03.76811154-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented SWR cache + local prompt merge in packages/cli/src/lib/registry-loader.ts"}
 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-r63","title":"Implement jfp bundles and bundle show commands","description":"Part 13.2 of PLAN. 'jfp bundles' lists available bundles (id, title, description, promptCount). 'jfp bundle show <id>' shows full bundle details (description, author, included prompts, workflow, whenToUse). Both support --json output. 'jfp install --bundle <id>' installs bundle as single combined SKILL.md file.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:43:58.727739318-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T00:43:58.727739318-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-r63","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-4fv","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:48:18.226359988-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-r63","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xdt","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:48:18.253623319-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-r7k","title":"Implement core package unit tests (packages/core/__tests__)","description":"**Details:**
- Test prompt registry: getPrompt, getPromptsByCategory, getPromptsByTag
- Test BM25 search: relevance, boosting, synonym expansion
- Test template renderer: variable substitution, defaults, edge cases
- Test export functions: SKILL.md generation, markdown export, JSON payload
- Test bundle/workflow logic: getBundlePrompts, generateBundleSkillMd
- Test schema validation: valid prompts pass, invalid prompts fail with clear errors

**Framework:** Vitest with happy-dom

**Coverage Target:** 90%+ for all exported functions

**Test Organization:**
```
packages/core/__tests__/
  prompts/
    registry.test.ts
    types.test.ts (type guards)
  search/
    bm25.test.ts
    tokenize.test.ts
    synonyms.test.ts
  export/
    skills.test.ts
    markdown.test.ts
    json.test.ts
  template/
    render.test.ts
```

**Reasoning:** Core package is imported by both web and CLI - bugs here propagate everywhere. Comprehensive tests ensure registry integrity, search quality, and export correctness.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:32:06.647470174-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T00:32:06.647470174-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-r7k","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ves","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:38:08.552583152-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
